item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 5min There will be public grandstand seating on the 17th at Quail Hollow for the first
item.description: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 5min There will be public grandstand seating on the 17th at Quail Hollow for the first time next month during the Truist Championship 394

item.title: KVanValkenburg: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 8min People in my mentions keep saying this, except he was faced with that exact
item.description: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 8min People in my mentions keep saying this, except he was faced with that exact scenario in 2025 (need to par 18 to win) and he did not hit 3 wood and did not make par. Cita IowaHawkeye07 @nedbird2003 · 12min En respuesta a @WhoopWhoopNFL @Mike_kim714 y @KVanValkenburg He knew he could get a bogey and still win. If he knew he needed a par to win, I think he hits a 3 wood off the tee to give himself a better chance at hitting the fairway. 1 15 3 mil

item.title: KVanValkenburg: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 19min Porath brought it up a few times this week but it was hard not to think of
item.description:
Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 19min Porath brought it up a few times this week but it was hard not to think of the Els quote about how Augusta seems to give breaks to some and torment others. It tormented Rory for years until he fought through, and then it felt like he got breaks this year he never did previously. Mostrar más Cita Roth @project_821 · 42min En respuesta a @Mike_kim714 y @KVanValkenburg Mike, Kevin
I think the most under discussed shot has been Rory’s third on 15…Mike, did you think a shot hit like that to that spot would skip up? Did he thin it a touch which took spin off? 25 8 mil

item.title:
NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 25min #LOOK — This is how much the top finishers earned at The Masters this year
This makes Ro
item.description:
NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 25min #LOOK — This is how much the top finishers earned at The Masters this year
This makes Rory the all-time leading money winner at Augusta, passing $13 million in career earnings 3 3 57 8 mil

item.title: DPWorldTour: DP World Tour @DPWorldTour · 31min Rory's shortest ever drive 14 8 mil
item.description: DP World Tour @DPWorldTour · 31min Rory's shortest ever drive 14 8 mil
